# Pensyve

> Universal memory runtime for AI agents. Framework-agnostic, protocol-native, offline-first.

Pensyve gives AI agents persistent, cognitive memory that spans across sessions. It remembers decisions, learned patterns, debugging outcomes, and project context — so agents never repeat the same investigation twice.

## Core Concepts

- **Three memory types**: Episodic (what happened), Semantic (what is known), Procedural (what works)
- **8-signal fusion retrieval**: Vector similarity, BM25, graph proximity, intent classification, recency, access frequency, confidence, type boost
- **FSRS forgetting curve**: Memories you use get stronger, unused ones fade naturally
- **Consolidation**: Background "dreaming" promotes repeated episodic facts to semantic knowledge
- **Offline-first**: SQLite + ONNX embeddings. No API keys needed for local use
- **Scales to cloud**: Postgres backend, managed service at pensyve.com

## Integration Options

### MCP Server (Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Windsurf, Continue, VS Code Copilot)

The MCP server exposes 6 tools: `pensyve_recall`, `pensyve_remember`, `pensyve_episode_start`, `pensyve_episode_end`, `pensyve_forget`, `pensyve_inspect`.

**Cloud** (no build required):
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "pensyve": {
      "url": "https://mcp.pensyve.com/mcp",
      "env": { "PENSYVE_API_KEY": "${PENSYVE_API_KEY}" }
    }
  }
}
```

**Local** (self-hosted):
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "pensyve": {
      "command": "pensyve-mcp",
      "args": ["--stdio"]
    }
  }
}
```

Build: `cargo build --release -p pensyve-mcp`

### Claude Code Plugin

```
/plugin marketplace add major7apps/pensyve/integrations/claude-code
/plugin install pensyve@pensyve
```

Provides 6 slash commands (`/remember`, `/recall`, `/forget`, `/inspect`, `/consolidate`, `/memory-status`), 4 skills, 2 agents, and 4 lifecycle hooks.

### Python SDK (PyO3, zero-overhead)

```bash
pip install pensyve
```

```python
import pensyve

p = pensyve.Pensyve(namespace="my-agent")
entity = p.entity("user", kind="user")
p.remember(entity=entity, fact="User prefers Python", confidence=0.95)
results = p.recall("programming language", entity=entity)

with p.episode(entity) as ep:
    ep.message("user", "Can you fix the login bug?")
    ep.message("agent", "Fixed — session token was expiring early")
    ep.outcome("success")
```

### TypeScript SDK (HTTP client)

```bash
npm install pensyve
```

```typescript
import { Pensyve } from "pensyve";

const p = new Pensyve({ baseUrl: "http://localhost:3000", apiKey: "psy_..." });
await p.remember({ entity: "user", fact: "Prefers TypeScript", confidence: 0.9 });
const memories = await p.recall("preferences", { entity: "user" });
```

### Go SDK

```bash
go get github.com/major7apps/pensyve/pensyve-go@latest
```

```go
import pensyve "github.com/major7apps/pensyve/pensyve-go"

client := pensyve.NewClient(pensyve.Config{BaseURL: "http://localhost:3000", APIKey: "psy_..."})
client.Remember(ctx, "user", "Prefers Go", 0.9)
memories, _ := client.Recall(ctx, "preferences", nil)
```

### REST API

```bash
cargo build --release --bin pensyve-mcp-gateway
./target/release/pensyve-mcp-gateway  # listens on 0.0.0.0:3000
```

Endpoints: `POST /v1/recall`, `POST /v1/remember`, `POST /v1/inspect`, `POST /v1/consolidate`, `POST /v1/entities`, `DELETE /v1/entities/{name}`, `GET /v1/stats`, `GET /v1/health`

### Framework Integrations

- **LangChain/LangGraph** (Python): `PensyveStore` — drop-in BaseStore replacement. `pip install pensyve-langchain`
- **LangChain.js/LangGraph.js** (TypeScript): `@pensyve/langchain`
- **CrewAI**: `PensyveMemory` — drop-in memory backend
- **AutoGen**: `PensyveMemory` — implements AutoGen Memory ABC
- **OpenClaw**: Native plugin with auto-recall and auto-capture hooks
- **OpenCode**: Native plugin with system prompt injection

All framework integrations auto-detect local vs cloud mode based on `PENSYVE_API_KEY`.

## Authentication

Set `PENSYVE_API_KEY` environment variable for cloud access. API keys use the `psy_` prefix. Not needed for local mode.

## Key URLs

- Website: https://pensyve.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/major7apps/pensyve
- MCP endpoint: https://mcp.pensyve.com/mcp
- REST API: https://api.pensyve.com
- API keys: https://pensyve.com/settings/api-keys
